title: PG al Volo - Character Generator for Fantastic Depths
description:
Generatore di personaggi rapido per Fantastic Depths (BECMI/RC). Fast character generator for Fantastic Depths (BECMI/RC rules). Create a fully equipped PC in under 10 seconds.

Features smart level selection (fixed, random 1-36 or dice formulas), class kits with gear from roll tables, race-specific naming, automatic import of class features, saving throws and GM notes.

Includes the main generator macro, Shop actor and loot roll tables.

This module was developed with AI assistance for code writing and optimization. The author has personally reviewed, tested, and fully understands every part and takes complete responsibility.
This package does **not** qualify as "Zero AI".
